title: Mississippi
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Mississippi

The Mississippi Consumer Assistance Program, Health Help Mississippi, is run by the Mississippi Insurance Department in partnership with the non-profit Mississippi Health Advocacy Program. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in Mississippi

You can apply for Medicaid in Mississippi by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Mississippi

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Mississippi

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Mississippi

CHIP in Mississippi

Mississippi Health Benefits covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Mississippi Health Benefits right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Mississippi Health Benefits.
